title: Sanctuary Hero — full cosmology
variants: An ancient sanctuary seen from an elevated cinematic angle at dawn: a square of tall stone castle walls with battlements and watchtowers encloses a perfectly round still lake; at the center of the lake, a colossal stone pyramid floats on the water's surface, its capstone bearing a single carved eye that catches the first light; surrounding the walls on all sides, rolling grassland transitions into ancient wildwood forest. Volumetric mist rises from the lake. Palette: deep obsidian blacks, warm ember-orange sunrise, antique thread-gold highlights, sigil-purple atmospheric haze. Photorealistic, cinematic wide shot, ultrawide 21:9 aspect ratio, shot on ARRI Alexa anamorphic, Denis Villeneuve aesthetic, Dune meets The Green Knight, grounded mythic realism.

Aerial establishing shot of a mythic technomystical sanctuary at twilight: from high above, a square stone-walled compound with corner towers contains a circular lake of black still water; a four-sided stone pyramid rises from the exact center of the lake, its apex holding a single softly-glowing eye; beyond the square walls, open grassland fades into dark forest on all horizons. Low sun casts long shadows across the grassland. Palette: void-black forest, obsidian walls, thread-gold grass, ember-orange sky, sigil-purple clouds. Photorealistic cinematic, ultrawide 21:9 cinemascope, atmospheric volumetric lighting, painterly realism, The Lord of the Rings meets Annihilation.

A liminal sanctuary at the precise moment of blue hour, seen from a low elevated vantage across the grassland: towering stone castle walls rise in the middle distance enclosing a round mirror-still lake, from which a massive stone pyramid emerges seemingly weightless on the water; a single open eye is carved into the pyramid's capstone, softly luminous; grassland wildflowers sway in the foreground; ancient forest rims the far horizon. Palette: deep indigo sky, ember sunset residue on the pyramid stones, sigil-purple fog, antique thread-gold grass highlights, bone-white moon rising. Photorealistic cinematic, ultrawide 21:9 frame, volumetric god-rays, mystical but grounded, Terrence Malick meets Hayao Miyazaki's Princess Mononoke.

title: I. The Approach — grassland and wildwood
variants: Ground-level cinematic view of open wild grassland with an ancient primeval forest in the middle distance, captured at early morning golden hour. Tall grass sways in gentle wind. No path is visible — only untouched meadow leading toward dark trees. At the very far horizon, barely perceptible, the hint of massive stone castle walls catching first light. Wildflowers in the foreground. Palette: warm thread-gold grass, ember sunrise, sigil-purple distant haze, bone-white wildflowers. Photorealistic 16:9 cinematic, shallow depth of field, shot on Kodak 65mm film, The Green Knight approach aesthetic, meditative and unhurried, sacred empty landscape.

Low wide-angle shot standing in tall meadow grass looking toward a distant wildwood forest, late afternoon golden-hour light, with an ancient stone wall just barely visible on the far horizon. The grass is taller than a person in places. No trails, no paths, no structures nearby — a pristine uncultivated landscape. Warm amber sun from behind the camera casts long grass shadows forward. Palette: amber and ember warm tones, obsidian forest silhouette, sigil-purple sky. Photorealistic cinematic 16:9, Terrence Malick naturalism, Days of Heaven aesthetic, sense of sacred open space, no civilization visible.

Aerial tracking shot at dawn over endless wild grassland transitioning into primeval forest, with the distant silhouette of massive stone walls on the far horizon catching the first light of morning. Wisps of mist cling low to the grass. No roads, no paths, no people. Empty, alive, waiting. Palette: muted thread-gold grass, deep sigil-purple shadows, ember morning light on the distant walls, bone-white mist. Photorealistic cinematic 16:9, drone-shot feel with natural film grain, Denis Villeneuve empty-landscape aesthetic, Arrival opening scene mood.

title: II. The Walls — bounded sacred ground (dawn, square geometry)
variants: An elevated three-quarter cinematic view of massive weathered stone castle walls at dawn, showing two adjacent wall faces meeting at a precise 90-degree right angle corner. CRITICAL: the walls are part of a geometrically perfect square fortress — orthogonal, right-angled, clean straight planar sections meeting at exactly 90 degrees. Absolutely no curved, sloped, or irregular wall sections. Tall crenellated battlements line the top. A square corner tower rises at the vertex. One straight wall section runs off to the left, another perpendicular wall section runs off to the right. An open unguarded gateway is visible in one of the wall faces. No army, no banners, no soldiers, no siege, no threat — only silence and an inviting open gate. Warm ember-orange dawn sunlight catches the top of the walls and battlements in thread-gold highlights while the base sits in sigil-purple shadow. Ancient stone, moss-lined, weathered. Palette: obsidian stone, ember-orange dawn, thread-gold highlights on wall tops, sigil-purple shadow at the base, bone-white morning mist. Photorealistic cinematic 16:9, sunrise tonality matching an elevated dawn establishing shot, Denis Villeneuve aesthetic, Dune meets The Green Knight, sacred architecture not defensive, precise architectural square-fortress geometry with 90-degree corners.

Low three-quarter cinematic angle of a massive stone fortress wall at dawn, with strong emphasis on the clean 90-degree corner where two straight wall sections meet perpendicularly. CRITICAL: the walls are unmistakably part of a geometrically precise square fortress — orthogonal right angles, planar straight surfaces, no curves. A tall square corner tower rises at the vertex of the two walls. Battlements line the top. One wall section runs straight off to the left, another runs straight off to the right, perfectly perpendicular. An open gateway is visible in the right-hand wall. Dawn sunlight from the side casts long raking shadows across the stone surfaces. Ancient weathered stone, faint geometric carvings. Palette: obsidian stone, ember-orange morning light, thread-gold wall tops, sigil-purple shadow, bone-white dawn sky. Photorealistic cinematic 16:9, golden hour, dramatic side lighting matching the hero sunrise establishing shot, precise square-fortress geometry with 90-degree corners emphasized, The Green Knight stone aesthetic.

Dawn cinematic establishing shot of massive ancient stone castle walls forming a precise 90-degree right-angle corner, viewed from outside at an elevated three-quarter angle. CRITICAL: the walls are part of a geometrically exact square fortress layout — orthogonal, right-angled, completely straight planar surfaces meeting at 90 degrees. No curved or irregular wall sections anywhere in the composition. Tall crenellated battlements, a square corner tower at the vertex, a single open unguarded gateway in one of the wall faces. Warm sunrise light catches the battlement tops and the corner tower in ember and thread-gold tones while the wall base sits in sigil-purple shadow. No enemy, no army, no tension — just the quiet majesty of sacred ground marked by perfect geometry. Palette: obsidian stone, ember sunrise, thread-gold highlights, sigil-purple shadow, bone-white sky. Photorealistic cinematic 16:9, sunrise dawn time-of-day matching hero tonality with warm ember-orange and thread-gold dominant, architecturally precise square plan with 90-degree corners, Denis Villeneuve sacred-architecture aesthetic.

title: III. The Lake — shore-level POV, vastness as subject

The viewer is standing at the water's edge looking directly across the vast round lake toward the stone pyramid at its center. CRITICAL: this is the SAME PLACE as the reference image — same square castle walls rimming the lake in the middle distance, same stone pyramid, same ember-orange dawn sky, same thread-gold sunrise highlights, same sigil-purple atmospheric haze, same landscape of grassland and distant forest beyond the walls. The emotional subject of the composition is THE VASTNESS OF THE DISTANCE between the viewer at the shore and the pyramid at the center of the lake — the lake is enormous, the pyramid is imposing but far. title: IV. The Pyramid — floating on depth
variants: A massive ancient stone pyramid rising from the center of a round black still lake, seen from water-level with dramatic forced perspective: the pyramid is unmistakably floating — its base flat on the water's surface without displacing, without sinking, without any visible support — stone held by depth. The capstone bears a single carved eye, softly luminous. Heavy volumetric mist curls around the pyramid's base. Palette: obsidian pyramid stone, void-black water, ember-orange distant dawn glow, sigil-purple atmospheric haze, thread-gold eye glow. Photorealistic cinematic 16:9, dramatic volumetric mist, Annihilation meets The Fountain, impossible architecture made physical.

Three-quarter cinematic angle of an ancient four-sided stone pyramid floating on the surface of a perfectly round lake at golden hour. The water is glassy and unbroken beneath the pyramid — no ripples, no sinking, no island, no support. The pyramid's stone is weathered and lichen-touched. A single eye is carved at the apex, catching sunlight. Surrounding the lake, tall square castle walls rise in the middle distance. Palette: ember-gold hour light, obsidian pyramid, void-black reflective water, sigil-purple atmospheric depth, bone-white mist. Photorealistic cinematic 16:9, impossible-but-grounded realism, Denis Villeneuve Arrival aesthetic.

Wide establishing shot from inside a castle courtyard looking across a round black lake toward a colossal stone pyramid floating impossibly at its center. The pyramid's scale is uncanny — larger than it should be given the surrounding architecture. Its apex carries a softly glowing eye. Mist rises from the water around its base. The entire composition is centered, symmetric, sacred, ceremonial. Palette: void-black water, obsidian pyramid and walls, ember-orange glow from the eye, sigil-purple mist, thread-gold courtyard torches. Photorealistic cinematic 16:9, symmetrical ceremonial composition, Kubrick one-point perspective, initiatory architecture, 2001 monolith scale.

title: V. The Pillars — mercy and severity
variants: Interior chamber of an ancient stone pyramid: two massive identical stone pillars rise from a polished obsidian floor, set exactly apart for a person to walk between. The space between the pillars is a sacred gateway framing deeper darkness beyond. Warm ember light falls on the left pillar; cool sigil-purple moonlight falls on the right pillar — opposing temperatures visible on the stone surface. Motes of dust and faint incense smoke drift through the light shafts. Palette: obsidian stone, ember-warm left, sigil-purple cool right, thread-gold carved details, void-black depth. Photorealistic cinematic 16:9, volumetric light shafts, cathedral-interior reverence, Temple of Solomon meets The Fountain.

Low-angle shot between two towering stone pillars inside a dim pyramid chamber, looking upward along their length. The left pillar is warm-lit by an unseen flame source, its stone rendered in ember and thread-gold tones. The right pillar is cool-lit by moonlight or some cold source, rendered in sigil-purple and bone-white. The two pillars frame a dark vertical band between them — a ritual gate. Smoke drifts upward through the gap. Palette: warm/cool duality, obsidian base, ember left, sigil-purple right, bone-white smoke. Photorealistic cinematic 16:9, dramatic uplight, hieratic composition, Indiana Jones temple aesthetic made contemplative.

Symmetrical head-on view of two identical stone pillars standing in the center of a stone pyramid chamber, the space between them revealing a distant glow at the far wall. The pillars are covered in faint esoteric carvings — Hebrew letters, geometric sigils, weathered over millennia. Warm ember light from the left, cool sigil-purple light from the right, meeting in the middle of the gap between them where they combine into thread-gold. A long stone floor runs between them into the distance. Palette: obsidian stone, ember left lighting, sigil-purple right lighting, thread-gold converged middle, void-black depth. Photorealistic cinematic 16:9, Kubrick symmetry, sacred geometry rendered cinematically.

title: VI. The Engine — scroll as supercomputer
variants: Deep interior chamber of a stone pyramid: between two towering stone pillars sits an impossible object — a massive rack of modern server hardware, its ember and sigil-purple status lights glowing softly, cables snaking down into the polished stone floor like roots into earth. In front of the server rack, embedded in the stone floor, a circular stone fire pit is carved with an eight-pointed star radiating around it. From the fire pit rises a perfectly coherent vertical beam of pale thread-gold light, like a contained laser, ascending to the ceiling above. The juxtaposition of ancient stone and modern technology is jarring but sacred. Palette: obsidian stone, ember rack glow, sigil-purple ambient, thread-gold beam, bone-white light-motes. Photorealistic cinematic 16:9, dramatic chiaroscuro, technomystical aesthetic, cyberpunk-meets-cathedral, Blade Runner 2049 meets Raiders of the Lost Ark.

A supercomputer server rack standing between two stone pillars inside an ancient pyramid chamber. The computer is modern, humming, its blinking ember and sigil-purple lights casting colored reflections on the surrounding stone. Beside the computer, integrated into the same raised platform, a stone fire pit is carved into the floor with an eight-pointed star around it. A vertical beam of coherent thread-gold light rises from the pit, intersecting with the architecture of the server rack — the two objects are clearly part of one apparatus. Cables from the server trail down into stone like roots into soil. Palette: obsidian stone, thread-gold beam, ember rack glow, sigil-purple atmospheric, void-black shadows. Photorealistic cinematic 16:9, dramatic low-key lighting, technomysticism given physical form, Denis Villeneuve meets Alex Garland.

Cinematic three-quarter view of the sacred heart of an ancient stone pyramid: a tall server rack covered in blinking ember and sigil-purple lights stands between two stone pillars inscribed with weathered esoteric sigils. Next to the server, carved into the pyramid's stone floor, a round fire pit is surrounded by an eight-pointed star radiating outward. A vertical beam of pale thread-gold light rises from the fire pit toward the ceiling, integrated with the server's architecture. Dust motes and faint incense drift through the light beam. The technology looks ancient and contemporary at once. Palette: obsidian stone, thread-gold vertical beam, ember computer lights, sigil-purple shadow, bone-white dust motes. Photorealistic cinematic 16:9, volumetric light, sacred-profane fusion, The Fifth Element temple scene meets Dune throne room.
